diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect_nerf_forward3.py
+++ b/inspect_nerf_forward3.py
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+import sys

+import inspect

+sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

+from tsr.system import TSR

+

+model = TSR.from_pretrained(

+    '/models/triposr',

+    config_name='config.yaml',

+    weight_name='model.ckpt',

+)

+

+source = inspect.getsource(model.renderer.__class__)

+lines = source.split('\n')

+for i, line in enumerate(lines):

+    if 'def _forward' in line:

+        print('\n'.join(lines[i:i+150]))

+        break
